checklist: Clear and honest terms of service
after.footer_text: Rohrfuchs Berlin operates as a straightforward plumbing service around the Berlin area. No unexpected costs – we stick to our quotes. We're qualified to handle regular issues and uncommon surprises in plumbing. We'll always be upfront about what needs doing and aim to use materials responsibly. Our work doesn't come with empty promises; just solid craftsmanship you can trust. Any personal details you share with us will be handled respectfully and kept safe. You're in steady hands with us.

after.rationale_one_liner: Crafted a footer that reflects the trustworthy reputation and honest service of a local Berlin plumber, ensuring plain communication with customers.

after.shot_brief:
10-shot list tailored to a plumber:
1. Before: the exact leak/fault as first found
2. After: the same angle, completed repair
3. Close-up of new fittings/pipework installed
4. Wide shot of the finished bathroom/kitchen/utility area
5. Tools and materials laid out neatly, van branding visible
6. Technician mid-task, PPE and branded workwear visible
7. Boiler/fixture nameplate or install detail for authenticity
8. Customer's space left tidy and protected (drop cloths, floor protection)
9. Service van parked outside the job site
10. A finished-job handshake or sign-off moment (only with customer permission)

after.before_excerpt: Unsere Sanitär-Leistungen für Berlin: Rohrreinigung und Abfluss-Service Sanitär-Notdienst rund um die Uhr Beseitigung von Rohrverstopfungen Leckortung und Dichtheitsprüfung Raumtrocknung nach Wasserschäden Bad- und Sanitärinstallation Heizungswartung und Thermen-Service Klempner-Service für Berlin und Umgebung

after.about_paragraph: Rohrfuchs Berlin bietet fachkundige Klempnerarbeiten in der Region Berlin an. Wir sind hier, um bei Wasserschäden, Rohrbrüchen oder anderen sanitären Notfällen zu helfen. Ganz gleich, ob es um die Beseitigung von Rohrverstopfungen geht oder um die Reinigung von Dachrinnen und Rohren – wir stehen an Ihrer Seite. Mit einer TV-Inspektion der Rohre und Kanäle können wir Probleme genau feststellen. Auch nach Wasserschäden sorgen wir mit Raum- und Gebäudetrocknung dafür, dass Ihr Zuhause trocknet. Muff und Schimmel entfernen wir ebenfalls gründlich und zuverlässig. Zusatzleistungen wie Dichtheitsprüfung, Leckortung, Heizungssupport sowie Gasthermen- und Ölheizungswartungen gehören auch zu unseren Angeboten. Wir sind Berlinern mit unserer Klempnerarbeit zur Stelle.
after.gbp_description_de: Rohrfuchs ist Ihr Ansprechpartner für alle Klempner- und Heizungsfragen in Berlin. Wir beseitigen Wasserschäden, reparieren Rohrbrüche und beheben Verstopfungen im Handumdrehen. Mit TV-Inspektionen und Leckortungen gehen wir Problemen auf den Grund. Heizungs- und Gasthermenwartungen bringen wir ebenfalls in Schuss. Bei uns erhalten Sie einen ehrlichen Service, der hält, was er verspricht.
after.gbp_description_en: Rohrfuchs is your go-to for plumbing and heating issues in Berlin. We handle water damage, repair burst pipes, and quickly clear blockages. With TV inspections and leak detections, we troubleshoot thoroughly. We also maintain heating systems and gas boilers. Expect straightforward service that delivers on its promise.

after.rationale_one_liner: The rewrite makes the description trustworthy and local-focused, eliminating marketing jargon while clearly stating services offered.

excerpts: No existing content for this channel on the site.

after.cta_text: Need a hand with your plumbing in Berlin?
after.contact_block_text: Get in touch with us at Rohrfuchs Berlin. We're here to help you sort out whatever plumbing issues you might have. Give us a call or drop us an email, and we'll figure out the best way to assist you.

after.rationale_one_liner: The text is crafted to embody the straightforward, approachable tone of a reliable local plumber, focusing on practical help and direct communication.

services.description: Got a tap that's dripping? It's a common problem, and we're here to fix it. We can repair most tap issues in a single visit.
If your sinks or toilets aren't draining like they should, you might have a blockage. We have the tools to clear those pipes right up.
Berlin winters can get chilly, so it's important to make sure your heating system is in working order. We offer straightforward checks and maintenance to keep everything running smoothly.
Whether you're renovating or just need a new fixture installed, we handle all kinds of bathroom installations with care.
Avoid bigger issues down the line with regular plumbing check-ups. We recommend scheduling maintenance to catch problems before they start.

after.rationale_one_liner: Structured service descriptions clearly outline the plumbing services offered, maintaining a local, trustworthy tone.

report.executive_summary: The overall assessment highlights significant areas needing improvement, particularly with text content where performance is weak. The lack of a legal footer, business description, and clear call-to-action hinders clarity and compliance. Image-related aspects fare better but are still lacking in showcasing proofs of work and team identity, which impacts trust and professionalism. The website requires optimization to enhance visibility and effectiveness. Immediate attention to high-severity issues and a strategic focus on creating a cohesive visual and written narrative are essential.
disclaimers: REPLAY SAMPLE: recorded from completed LIVE audit of a real Berlin business on 2026-07-18. For publication, every name, phone number, address, URL, and quoted site text has been replaced with the fictional 'Rohrfuchs Berlin' persona, and all harvested photos with synthetic placeholder images. Replay makes no live partner calls.

score.evidence: Homepage slider graphic with a headline and phone-number banner overlay — marketing graphic, not a real job photo
Novelty stock image of a dog peering into a drain pipe with promotional text — not genuine work
Screenshot of a tablet displaying the services menu — a marketing graphic, not a real job photo
Service slider with a price-list text overlay — marketing graphic, not real work
Real on-site photo of a technician in branded workwear servicing a gas boiler — genuine job proof
Real photo of drying equipment set up at a water-damage job site — genuine work in progress
Slider graphic listing services with text overlay — marketing, not a real job photo
Close-up photo of a freshly cleaned drain after service — genuine work but small, low-res

meta.prompt: Photorealistic, warm, natural-light photo of a freshly completed plumbing repair — clean new pipework and fixtures, tools neatly organized nearby, clearly finished professional work, photorealistic, warm, natural light, honest working atmosphere, no text, no logos.
Photorealistic, warm, natural-light photo of a friendly professional plumber in branded workwear installing a modern bathroom fixture in a German home, honest working atmosphere, no text, no logos.

Photorealistic, warm, natural-light photo of a small plumbing team of 2-3 people in matching branded workwear standing together in front of their service van, confident and approachable, photorealistic, warm, natural light, honest working atmosphere, no text, no logos.

Improve this real plumber photo for website use. Preserve the people, place, work, branding, and factual content. Correct lighting, clarity, crop, and distracting clutter only; do not invent work, credentials, customers, logos, or outcomes.
